userStories.title: 把通用 forge interaction_script_id 接到 SettlementForgeService
acceptanceCriteria: 非 `service_master_reforge` 的 forge interaction_script_id 也能进入 forge handler
forge 路由仍通过 `GameRuntimeSettlementCommandHandler`，不把规则回塞到 UI

userStories.title: 让通用 forge modal 进入 snapshot 与 text snapshot
acceptanceCriteria: generic forge modal 的 window_data 能进入 runtime snapshot
text snapshot 能渲染通用 forge 条目而不只覆盖 master_reforge
userStories.lastLearnings: Generic forge UI state can currently travel through shared shop-like context even though headless ownership belongs to the forge modal, so snapshot code needs to be panel-kind aware instead of assuming only dedicated `master_reforge` forge context. Runtime ownership/read sets did not change, so `docs/design/project_context_units.md` remains valid as-is.

userStories.title: 新增首批通用 forge 配方资源与设施标签约束
acceptanceCriteria: 至少新增 1 条非 `master_reforge` 的正式 `RecipeDef` 资源
`run_item_recipe_schema_regression` 可校验新配方的 item 引用和 facility tag
userStories.lastLearnings: Generic forge seed content can be added without changing runtime ownership: `RecipeDef` resources remain owned by CU-10 data/registry, `GameSession` just caches validated defs, and `docs/design/project_context_units.md` stays valid as-is. Durable rule added: formal recipes must now declare at least one non-empty, non-duplicate facility tag so later forge routing can trust the schema.

userStories.title: 跑通通用 forge 配方的据点端到端执行
acceptanceCriteria: 据点执行通用 forge 配方会原子扣料并把成品写入 shared warehouse
forge 成功后的反馈、日志和持久化回写有正式回归覆盖
notes: 验证入口优先用 world_map runtime regression。
userStories.lastLearnings: Fixed-world start-flow checks should anchor on `player_start_coord` instead of `player_start_settlement_id`; generic forge services can live on non-`craft` facilities like `oath_command_post`, so forge recipe matching must derive forge tags from the interaction id, not only facility category/type.

userStories.title: 落地 contract board 的正式 modal 开关链路
acceptanceCriteria: 点击 `service_contract_board` 会打开任务板 modal
关闭任务板后能安全返回 settlement modal，modal 互斥保持稳定
userStories.lastChecksRun: Ran `godot --headless --script tests/world_map/runtime/run_game_runtime_settlement_command_handler_regression.gd` and `godot --headless --script tests/text_runtime/run_text_command_regression.gd` after fixing compile/runtime issues; both pass.
userStories.lastLearnings: The contract-board modal only routes through the formal branch when settlement action payload carries `interaction_script_id=service_contract_board`; once routed, `contract_board` is a first-class mutually-exclusive modal that must block reward presentation and is now visible in structured/text snapshots via `[CONTRACT_BOARD]`.

userStories.title: 让 contract board 按 provider_interaction_id 过滤任务列表
acceptanceCriteria: 任务板只展示 `provider_interaction_id` 匹配当前服务的 `QuestDef`
runtime snapshot 和 text snapshot 能读取当前任务板列表
userStories.lastLearnings: Contract-board ownership stays split as expected: quest-provider truth lives on `QuestDef.provider_interaction_id`, filtered board assembly belongs in `GameRuntimeSettlementCommandHandler`, and headless/runtime/text snapshot consumers should read the already-filtered active contract-board context rather than re-filtering in UI or snapshot layers.

userStories.title: 支持从 contract board 正式接取任务
acceptanceCriteria: 任务板动作会调用正式 quest accept 命令并写入 `PartyState.active_quests`
重复接取、已完成、repeatable 三类情况都有明确反馈
userStories.lastLearnings: The real UI path now supplies contract-board service metadata on confirm, but synthetic text-command submissions still need explicit `interaction_script_id`/service fields when the test settlement does not seed a formal contract-board service. Duplicate/completed/repeatable feedback now intentionally comes from the formal `quest.accept` command, not from ad-hoc contract-board-only rules.

userStories.title: 让 bounty registry 复用正式任务板表面
acceptanceCriteria: `service_bounty_registry` 可打开与 contract board 共用的任务板表面
bounty 列表能按自己的 provider id 过滤，不污染 contract board 列表
userStories.lastLearnings: `service_bounty_registry` can reuse the existing `contract_board` surface safely as long as provider isolation continues to come from `QuestDef.provider_interaction_id`. No new modal ID, snapshot section, or dedicated bounty window is required for additional task-board providers.

userStories.title: 为 board 接取路径补 text/headless 回归
acceptanceCriteria: text/headless 场景可验证 `open board -> accept quest -> snapshot changed`
现有最小 `quest accept` 命令回归继续通过
userStories.lastLearnings: `run_text_command_script.gd` reads `OS.get_cmdline_user_args()`, so scenario paths must be passed after `--`. No runtime ownership or context-unit boundaries changed, so `docs/design/project_context_units.md` stays valid as-is.

userStories.title: 把 quest completion 与 reward claim 拆成正式状态
acceptanceCriteria: 任务完成后存在可识别的 claimable reward 状态，而不只是进入 `completed_quest_ids`
runtime 和 snapshot 能区分 active、completed、claimable 三种阶段
userStories.lastLearnings: Durable contract is now: objective completion moves a quest from `active_quests` to `claimable_quests`; `completed_quest_ids` is reserved for post-reward finalization; runtime/headless surfaces must expose `active_quest_ids`, `claimable_quest_ids`, and `completed_quest_ids` distinctly. Save compatibility stayed on `PartyState.version = 3` because missing `claimable_quests` cleanly defaults to empty on load.

userStories.title: 实现 quest gold reward materializer
acceptanceCriteria: `QuestDef.reward_entries` 的 gold 条目可在 claim 时转成 `PartyState.gold` 变更
gold reward 的 claim 结果有稳定 runtime regression
userStories.lastLearnings: Quest completion/claim is now a two-step formal path: completed quests stay in `claimable_quests` until `command_claim_quest()` materializes rewards and moves them to `completed_quest_ids`. Contract-board submissions must branch on entry state: `claimable` uses quest claim, while other states continue through quest accept/reaccept.

userStories.title: 实现 quest item reward materializer
acceptanceCriteria: `QuestDef.reward_entries` 的 item 条目可在 claim 时写入 shared warehouse
容量不足时返回正式失败或 overflow 反馈，不能静默吞奖励

userStories.title: 实现 quest pending_character_reward materializer
acceptanceCriteria: `QuestDef.reward_entries` 的成长型奖励会进入 `pending_character_rewards`
claim reward 后仍走现有 reward flow，不新增平行奖励容器

userStories.title: 为 submit_item 目标增加正式仓库扣除入口
acceptanceCriteria: `submit_item` 目标能从 shared warehouse 扣除指定 item 与数量
扣除失败时不会推进 quest objective，也不会吞库存

userStories.title: 把 submit_item 扣除结果接到 objective progress 与失败回归
acceptanceCriteria: 交付成功后会推进对应 objective 并按需要触发 completion/claimable 状态
数量不足、错误物品两条失败路径有明确回归覆盖

userStories.title: 为 research 服务分配正式 interaction_script_id 与 settlement 路由
acceptanceCriteria: world config 中的 research 服务能走正式 action dispatch，而不是只靠 `interaction_type` 占位
research 服务不会继续留在 `UNIMPLEMENTED_INTERACTION_IDS` 的伪可用状态

userStories.title: 实现 research 奖励构造器
acceptanceCriteria: research 服务可构造 skill 或 knowledge 型 `PendingCharacterReward`
research 奖励来源字段与现有 reward queue 命名保持一致

userStories.title: 为 research 服务补 reward flow 与 text regression
acceptanceCriteria: research 服务可在据点、snapshot、text snapshot 中验证奖励呈现时机
reward flow regression 覆盖 research 生成的 pending reward

userStories.title: 补齐第一批单手武器 seed 内容
acceptanceCriteria: 单手武器从 1 类扩到至少 2 类
新增武器补齐价格、标签、equipment_type 与槽位元数据

userStories.title: 补齐第二批单手武器 seed 内容
acceptanceCriteria: 单手武器从至少 2 类扩到至少 4 类
新增武器能被商店、掉落或配方正式引用

userStories.title: 补齐头部护具与新装备元数据校验
acceptanceCriteria: 正式装备 seed 至少补出 head 槽装备
新增装备通过 equipment/schema regression，不破坏现有装备快照
notes: 当前 body 与 accessory 已有正式 seed。

userStories.title: 补齐消耗品 seed 到最小可玩集合
acceptanceCriteria: 消耗品从 1 类扩到至少 4 类
新增消耗品能进入商店与仓库 schema 回归

userStories.title: 补齐第一批材料 seed 内容
acceptanceCriteria: 材料从 1 类扩到至少 3 类
新增材料有稳定 `tags` / `crafting_groups` 元数据

userStories.title: 补齐第二批材料 seed 内容
acceptanceCriteria: 材料从至少 3 类扩到至少 6 类
新增材料可被正式配方或掉落表引用

userStories.title: 新增任务物品 seed 并补交叉引用回归
acceptanceCriteria: 正式任务物品至少达到 3 类
任务物品可被 quest condition、warehouse schema 与 text snapshot 共同引用

userStories.title: 新增前排承伤/近战冲锋敌人模板
acceptanceCriteria: 新增模板后正式 enemy templates 总数达到至少 6
新增模板覆盖前排承伤或近战冲锋职责，不回落到旧默认模板

userStories.title: 新增远程压制/治疗控制敌人模板
acceptanceCriteria: 新增模板后正式 enemy templates 总数达到至少 8
新增模板覆盖远程压制与治疗控制职责

userStories.title: 新增第二个正式 encounter roster 并接到 world encounter 映射
acceptanceCriteria: 除 `wolf_den` 外至少存在 1 个正式 roster
至少一类 world encounter 可显式命中新 roster

userStories.title: 实现 `narrow_assault` 地形 profile 生成器
acceptanceCriteria: `BattleTerrainGenerator` 支持 `narrow_assault` profile
profile 生成结果有明确狭道/突破站位意图，并保持可通过

userStories.title: 把 `narrow_assault` 接到测试入口与 board regression
acceptanceCriteria: 至少一个测试入口或 world hook 能显式使用 `narrow_assault`
battle board regression 覆盖其布局、出生点与 prop 契约

userStories.title: 实现 `holdout_push` 地形 profile 生成器
acceptanceCriteria: `BattleTerrainGenerator` 支持 `holdout_push` profile
profile 生成结果有明确守点/推进站位意图

userStories.title: 把 `holdout_push` 接到测试入口与 board regression
acceptanceCriteria: 至少一个测试入口或 world hook 能显式使用 `holdout_push`
battle board regression 覆盖其布局、部署点与核心 prop 契约

userStories.title: 抽出 BattleHitResolver 并锁定现有命中口径
acceptanceCriteria: 命中判定有单一 `BattleHitResolver` owner
迁移前后现有 smoke 与 AI 回归的命中结果保持一致

userStories.title: 让 preview、HUD 与 runtime 共用 BattleHitResolver
acceptanceCriteria: preview/HUD 不再各自维护独立命中口径
battle UI 与 runtime parity regression 能覆盖 resolver 共用结果

userStories.title: 把命中公式切到 BAB + 负 AC + d20
acceptanceCriteria: `BattleHitResolver` 使用 BAB + 负 AC + d20 正式结算
battle log 与 preview 读取同一套新公式结果

userStories.title: 为新命中模型补 natural 1/20 与 seeded regression
acceptanceCriteria: natural 1 / natural 20 语义在 resolver 中显式固定
新增 deterministic regression 验证 seeded roll 与边界命中

userStories.title: 实现 stamina_cost 的正式扣费路径
acceptanceCriteria: 技能释放会正式扣除 stamina
battle state 与 snapshot 能稳定暴露当前 stamina

userStories.title: 实现 cooldown_tu 的正式递减路径
acceptanceCriteria: 技能施放后会写入 cooldown 状态
TU 推进或回合切换会按统一规则减少 cooldown

userStories.title: 为 stamina/cooldown 补选择层与回归约束
acceptanceCriteria: selection gating、UI 提示和 AI 判定都能识别 stamina/cooldown 不可施放
text/headless 回归覆盖至少 1 条资源不足和 1 条 cooldown 未结束路径

userStories.title: 为 Aura 建立正式状态字段与 snapshot 表面
acceptanceCriteria: `BattleUnitState`、runtime snapshot 和 text snapshot 能正式暴露 Aura
`aura_cost` 不再只是悬空 schema 字段

userStories.title: 实现 Aura 消耗、gating 与回归
acceptanceCriteria: Aura 技能会正式扣 Aura
Aura 不足时 selection/runtime/AI 都会返回一致失败

userStories.title: 引入状态效果语义表
acceptanceCriteria: `status_effects` 有正式 semantic table 定义 stack、duration 与 tick 口径
`burning`、`slow`、`staggered` 至少接入表内定义

userStories.title: 把状态持续时间管理接到 battle runtime 并补回归
acceptanceCriteria: 状态的施加、续时、清除和 tick 走统一时序
battle smoke regression 覆盖状态持续时间与序列化

userStories.title: 补齐 line 与 cone 范围图形收集器
acceptanceCriteria: `combat_profile` 的 `line` 与 `cone` 都有正式 target collection
收集结果可被 selection 与 execute 共同复用

userStories.title: 补齐 radius 与 self 范围图形收集器
acceptanceCriteria: `combat_profile` 的 `radius` 与 `self` 都有正式 target collection
ground/unit/self 三类模式的最小契约保持清晰

userStories.title: 为范围图形补 selection/execute shared regression
acceptanceCriteria: selection、高亮、合法性校验和实际结算使用同一范围结果
battle UI 或 skill protocol regression 覆盖至少 1 个非单体技能

userStories.title: 建立 AI 技能评分上下文
acceptanceCriteria: AI 评分至少能读取命中收益、目标数量、资源消耗与站位目标
`BattleAiService` 或 sidecar 有清晰的 score input owner

userStories.title: 让敌方按评分选择技能并补关键 brain 回归
acceptanceCriteria: AI 不再只按 action 顺序选技能
AI regression 覆盖 `melee_aggressor` 与 `ranged_controller` 的关键分支

userStories.title: 为 enemy 或 roster 引入正式掉落 schema
acceptanceCriteria: 至少一种 enemy/roster 有正式 drop profile 或等价 schema
掉落身份命名稳定，可供 battle resolution 直接消费

userStories.title: 在 battle resolution 中正式填充 loot_entries
acceptanceCriteria: `_build_battle_resolution_result()` 会生成 canonical `loot_entries`
`BattleResolutionResult` regression 覆盖 loot round-trip 稳定性

userStories.title: 把战后 loot 正式提交到 shared warehouse
acceptanceCriteria: battle victory 后 loot 会走正式入仓路径
warehouse mutation 不绕过 `PartyWarehouseService`

userStories.title: 实现 overflow_entries 与掉落溢出反馈
acceptanceCriteria: 容量不足时 battle resolution 会生成 `overflow_entries`
runtime/message/snapshot 会显式提示未装下的掉落

userStories.title: 让 text snapshot 渲染 loot 与 overflow 结果
acceptanceCriteria: text snapshot 可见 loot 与 overflow 摘要
无 loot 场景不会破坏既有 snapshot 顺序

userStories.title: 为 loot/overflow 增加 text command 与 expect 回归
acceptanceCriteria: text command 场景可断言 loot 入仓与 overflow
headless 回归串起 `battle -> loot -> snapshot` 最小闭环

userStories.title: 建立 profession resource schema 与 registry scan
acceptanceCriteria: `data/configs/professions/` 下的 profession resources 可被扫描与校验
registry failure 会报告缺失 ID、重复 ID 与非法引用

userStories.title: 把正式 profession seed 迁出 ProgressionContentRegistry
acceptanceCriteria: 正式 profession seed 由资源提供，不再硬编码在 `ProgressionContentRegistry`
progression regression 在迁移后继续通过

userStories.title: 建立 skill resource schema、registry scan 与兼容桥
acceptanceCriteria: `data/configs/skills/` 下的 skill resources 可被扫描与校验
在 seed 未全迁完前，registry 仍有最小兼容桥接

userStories.title: 迁移 warrior 与 archer 正式技能 seed
acceptanceCriteria: warrior / archer 正式技能不再依赖 spec 文件作为唯一真相源
battle 与 progression regressions 在迁移后继续通过

userStories.title: 迁移 mage 技能 seed 并固定 cast_variant 兼容回归
acceptanceCriteria: mage 正式技能迁到 resources 后，cast_variant 仍可被稳定加载
相关 regression 覆盖 root-level cast_variant 的兼容语义

userStories.title: 建立 enemy resource schema 与 registry scan
acceptanceCriteria: enemy template、brain、roster 可通过资源目录扫描和校验
registry 能报告缺失模板、缺失 brain 与非法 roster 引用

userStories.title: 把 enemy template、brain 与 roster seed 迁出 EnemyContentRegistry
acceptanceCriteria: 正式敌方 seed 由资源提供，不再硬编码在 `enemy_content_registry.gd`
wild encounter 与 battle AI regression 在迁移后继续通过

userStories.title: 建立统一资源 validation runner 并覆盖 missing/duplicate/invalid
acceptanceCriteria: profession、skill、enemy、item、recipe、quest 至少覆盖 missing id、duplicate id、invalid reference 三类错误
validation runner 输出可直接用于回归与排障

userStories.title: 把 validation 输出接到 headless regression 面
acceptanceCriteria: 资源校验失败可在 headless/test output 中稳定暴露
validation regression 不依赖人工读取随机日志定位
